rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex blocks or fixing syntax errors
Use only visible identifiers in guarantees and assumptions
Place guarantees in the component type annex when possible
Use AGREE logical operators for branching and implications
generic_rules: Repair validator diagnostics without changing unrelated architecture
Use only visible identifiers in guarantees and assumptions
Place guarantees in the component type annex when possible
Use AGREE logical operators for branching and implications
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested `if ... then ... else` for branching logic
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not use unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations in guarantees
Do not use AGREE scalar type names like 'integer' or 'boolean' in declarations
